name: Spinach Pierogi Pizza
recipeIngredient: 9 oz Pkg Green Giant Harvest potatoes, thawed, squeezed to drain
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Grease a 13 x 9-inch pan.
3. Unroll the dough and place it in the greased pan, starting at the center. Press out with hands.
4. Bake for 7 to 9 minutes or until light golden brown.
5. Meanwhile, cook spinach and chopped onion in butter until the onion is crisp-tender.
6. Stir in mashed potatoes; mix well.
7. In a small bowl, combine oil and garlic salt; mix well.
8. Brush over the partially baked crust.
9. Top with the spinach mixture.
10. Sprinkle with mozzarella cheese, then Cheddar cheese.
11. Top with onion rings.
12. Bake for another 15 to 20 minutes or until the cheese is melted and the edges of the crust are golden brown.
